title: Works the System
summary: You can exploit flaws in artificial systems, including but not limited to computer code.
tiers: Tier 3: Confidence Artist or Skill With Attacks
Tier 6: Call in Favor or Greater Enhanced Potential
gm_intrusions: Contacts sometimes have ulterior motives. Devices sometimes have failsafes or even traps.
text: You can exploit flaws in artificial systems, including but not limited to computer code.
details: You can exploit flaws in artificial systems, including but not limited to computer code.
